results.overview: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren work to help a family terrorized by a dark presence in their farmhouse. Forced to confront a powerful entity, the Warrens find themselves caught in the most terrifying case of their lives.
results.title: The Conjuring

results.name: The Conjuring
results.overview: Based on the film franchise. Plot TBA.
Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one last terrifying case involving mysterious entities they must confront.
results.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites

results.overview: Lorraine and Ed Warren travel to north London to help a single mother raising four children alone in a house plagued by malicious spirits.
results.title: The Conjuring 2

results.original_title: The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It
results.overview: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren encounter what would become one of the most sensational cases from their files. The fight for the soul of a young boy takes them beyond anything they'd ever seen before, to mark the first time in U.S. history that a murder suspect would claim demonic possession as a defense.
results.title: The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It

results.overview: After discovering his blood-soaked daughter dead in the bathtub, David Bryson attends a self-help group to help save him from his ghostly nightmares. But when a group of mysterious cult-like women offer to help him resurrect his daughter. David's choices will not just decide his fate... but the fate of his dead daughter's SOUL.
results.title: Conjuring the Cult

results.overview: A prequel in the franchise. Plot TBA.
results.title: The Conjuring: First Communion

results.overview: A sleep study goes awry when participants start to go missing.
results.title: Conjuring: The Beyond

results.original_title: Conjuring: The Book of the Dead
results.overview: A writer of graphic novels who is given the task of writing a biography on the foremost occultist Aleister Crowley. Things start to go wrong when he discovers a rune inserted in Crowley's diary when visiting New Orleans.
results.title: Conjuring: The Book of the Dead

results.overview: Before The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It began filming, a bishop from the Order of Exorcists was called to bless the studio, cast, and crew. This is the story of The Conjuring, and how the films and their real life inspirations connect behind the scenes.
results.title: Faith & Fear: The Conjuring Universe

results.overview: A young girl frees a demonic spirit from an amulet, and it begins possessing everyone around her. Now, she must find a way to get the spirit back into the amulet.
results.title: Conjuring the Genie

results.overview: A woman who is struggling with the conflict between her faith and her personal life must defend herself against the spirit of a demonic nun who is bent on destroying her.
results.title: Conjuring the Devil

results.overview: An aspiring novelist soon finds the deadly reality behind the legend of a Wishmaker.
results.title: Conjuring The Genie 2

results.original_title: Surviving a Week at the Real Conjuring House
results.overview: Day 1 of Sam and Colby's week long stay at The Real Conjuring House. The ghost hunters try to survive a week at the most haunted house in America to see if this place is truly demonic. But after meeting Cody and Satori and learning of their knocking method, everything changes.
results.title: Surviving a Week at the Real Conjuring House

results.overview: To settle an argument over the integrity of 'The Conjuring', two friends try and summon a demonic spirit using household items.
results.title: The Conjuring Is Bullshit!

results.overview: Equipped with a new experiment inspired by declassified CIA documents, Outkast Paranormal will travel to one of America's most notoriously haunted locations, The Conjuring House, to finally gain answers to what's on the other side.
results.title: The Conjuring House Experiments

results.original_title: The Harrisville Haunting: The Real Conjuring House
results.overview: Four paranormal researchers and YouTubers document the paranormal claims of the Harrisville Farmhouse. The inspiration for the well known movie "The Conjuring". Is it truly haunted?
results.title: The Harrisville Haunting: The Real Conjuring House

results.overview: Annabelle Turns 16, and the evil turns.. sexy?
results.title: The Conjuring: Annabelle Turns 16

results.original_title: The Sleepless Unrest: The Real Conjuring Home
results.overview: Filmmakers and paranormal investigators spend two weeks in the world-famous home that inspired the horror movie "The Conjuring."
results.title: The Sleepless Unrest: The Real Conjuring Home

results.original_title: Surviving a Week at the Real Conjuring House PT 2: The Woods
results.overview: PART 2 (Day 2 & 3) of Sam and Colby’s week long stay at The Real Conjuring House. The ghost hunters investigate the woods behind the most haunted house in America and get direct communication with the afterlife through Cody and Satori’s Knocking Method.
results.title: Surviving a Week at the Real Conjuring House PT 2: The Woods
